metadata.title: Folo
metadata.description: AI-powered RSS reader for deep, noise-free reading with contextual AI.
metadata.keywords: Folo, AI RSS reader, RSS, summarize, translate, research, open source, content discovery, information browser

hero.title: <brand>Folo</brand> is the <highlight>AI</highlight> Reader
hero.bodyLine1: The AI that reads the internet for you,
hero.bodyLine2: cutting through noise to surface the knowledge you actually care about.

features.headline: Reading reimagined in the AI era

discover.label: Discover
discover.titleRest: from millions across the Internet — while you stay in full control.

twin.label: Digital Twin
twin.titleStrong: Everything you Folo trains your AI
twin.titleRest: to think like you. It remembers, adapts, and evolves with every update.

vibe.label: Vibe Read
vibe.titleRest: Sit back, vibe, and only get notified when insights or signals truly matter.

builtOpen.title: Built Open
builtOpen.body: Transparent, verifiable, and crafted with the community. Explore the code, file issues, and shape the reading experience together.
builtOpen.note: Built with modern primitives: accessible, keyboard-friendly, and optimized for performance. PRs welcome.

repoStats.repoDescriptionMobile: Built with modern primitives: accessible, keyboard-friendly, and optimized for performance. PRs welcome.

socialProof.headline: Folo is how the curious read in the AI era.

metadata.title: Download Folo
metadata.description: Download Folo for Desktop or use it on the Web. Available on macOS, Windows, and Linux.

hero.title: Download <brand>Folo</brand>
hero.subtitle: Get the full power of AI-powered reading on Desktop, or access it instantly on the Web.

platforms.footer: By downloading, you agree to our <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
